description: Timeless and Classics Zero (TACZ) — Brain mapping and role definitions.

rifleman.description: Standard infantry soldier. Engages targets at medium range.

sniper.description: Long-range specialist. Holds position and eliminates priority targets.

support.description: Heavy weapons or logistics. Suppresses enemies and resupplies allies.

npc_assignments._comment: Maps NPC entity IDs to roles. Edit this section to assign roles to specific NPCs.
